ddls:
CREATE TABLE "optimization_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization run */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the run */,
  "time" REAL /* Execution time of the run */,
  "fitness" INTEGER /* Fitness value achieved in this run */,
  "fevals" INTEGER /* Number of function evaluations made during the run */,
  "use_fast_mimic" INTEGER /* Indicates if fast mimic method was used */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size used in the optimization algorithm */,
  "keep_percent" REAL /* Percentage of individuals to keep for the next generation */,
  "max_iters" INTEGER /* Maximum number of iterations allowed for the optimization run */,
  "algorithm_type" INTEGER /* Type of algorithm used for the run */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of problem being solved */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run */,
  "seed_value" INTEGER /* Seed value used for reproducibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm and its use cases */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was added to the system */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author or creator of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or affiliation of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title or role within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level or severity */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alg_run_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used in the run */,
  "fitness_score" INTEGER /* Final fitness score achieved in the run */,
  "avg_fitness_score" REAL /* Average fitness score achieved in the run */,
  "std_dev_fitness_score" REAL /* Standard deviation of the fitness scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alg_run_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alg_run_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization run */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size used for the run */,
  "keep_percent" REAL /* Percentage of individuals to keep for the next generation */,
  "max_iters" INTEGER /* Maximum number of iterations for the optimization run */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., default, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization run */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the run */,
  "fitness_value" INTEGER /* Fitness value achieved in the run */,
  "avg_execution_time" REAL /* Average execution time of the run */,
  "std_dev_execution_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of the execution times */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can edit the algorithm */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view the algorithm */,
  "access_list" TEXT /* Access control list (ACL) for the algorithm or run */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the algorithm type (e.g., evolutionary, swarm intelligence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm affected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
